normalization.notes: Store Bopomofo symbols and tone marks in NFC. Preserve first-tone unmarked syllables, explicit tone marks, and neutral-tone dot placement for reviewer audit.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: Bopomofo initials, medials, finals, syllable groups, unmarked first tone, second third fourth and neutral tone marks, and Mandarin pronunciation cross references
segmentation.notes: Bopomofo is taught as Mandarin pronunciation notation. V1 should segment syllables explicitly and may show Hanzi or pinyin only as support metadata.
